models.name: Bathtub
models.description: Water drains at a fixed rate; inflow begins after a delay

models.name: Coffee Cooling
models.description: Coffee temperature decays toward room temperature

models.name: Exponential Growth
models.description: Population growing with constant birth and death rates

models.name: Goal Seeking
models.description: Inventory adjusts toward a goal via negative feedback

models.name: Cocaine Flow
models.description: Simple drug flow model with import, use, and confiscation rates demonstrating balancing feedback

models.name: Inventory Oscillation
models.description: Car dealership inventory with perception and delivery delays

models.name: Predator Prey
models.description: Lotka-Volterra model of predator-prey oscillation

models.name: Muskrat Plague
models.description: Muskrat population dynamics with trapping and licensing, illustrating negative feedback through harvest pressure

models.name: Kaibab Deer
models.description: Deer population on the Kaibab Plateau (1900-1950) limited by predation, using a lookup table for kill rate

models.name: Bluefin Tuna Overfishing
models.description: Two-stock model of Northern Bluefin Tuna overfishing with fleet adjustment creating overshoot-and-collapse

models.name: Ecological Overshoot
models.description: Consumer population depletes renewable resource, creating classic overshoot-and-collapse dynamics

models.name: S-Shaped Growth
models.description: Logistic population growth limited by carrying capacity

models.name: SIR Epidemic
models.description: Classic Susceptible-Infectious-Recovered compartmental model

models.name: 0211CLDbankrun
models.description: Causal loop diagram of positive feedback loops driving bank run dynamics

models.name: 0601Cocaine_CLD
models.description: Causal loop diagram of feedback loops in cocaine use and addiction dynamics

models.name: 0201CompetitionFaculty
models.description: Causal loop diagram of competitive dynamics among faculty members

models.name: 0210ConflictInMiddleEast
models.description: Causal loop diagram of escalation and de-escalation dynamics in Middle East conflicts

models.name: 0204MunroLane
models.description: Causal loop diagram illustrating neighborhood dynamics and tipping points

models.name: 1009_RANDOMvsRANDOMIZED
models.description: Demonstrates the difference between RANDOM and RANDOMIZED functions in Vensim

models.name: 0203REMaggregatedCLDen1
models.description: Aggregated causal loop diagram of real estate market feedback structure

models.name: repair01
models.description: Causal loop diagram of equipment repair feedback showing failure rates and maintenance capacity

models.name: repair02
models.description: Stock-flow equipment repair model with maintenance workforce, failure rates, and repair throughput.

models.name: MARKET
models.description: Market dynamics model with product adoption, competitive pricing, and capacity expansion feedbacks.

models.name: advertising
models.description: Advertising effectiveness model showing how ad spending drives customer awareness and sales.

models.name: BPR0
models.description: Causal loop diagram of a business process reengineering problem with no stock-flow structure
